clientMessages.author: davi_dinicio
clientMessages.content:
Hi <@1392579058499326065>, Happy Monday!

**I’m reaching out to do our weekly check-in, but today I want to approach things a bit differently. We are dedicating this week to heavily optimizing and prioritizing your account**

and I am personally reviewing everything to identify any potential bottlenecks in your campaign.

A quick "thumbs up" or a general update is fine for a regular week, **but right now**, I really need to dig deeper. As the person responsible for fixing issues and improving your lead quality, I rely entirely on your specific feedback from the front lines. >
Instead of a general overview, could you please take a moment today to provide a detailed, lead-by-lead breakdown of your recent appointments and calls? Specifically, I need to know:

Who closed?

Who didn't close, and exactly why? (e.g., price was too high, wrong location, just looking for free quotes, didn't answer after X tries).

This exact data is the only way I can adjust our targeting, stop wasting your budget on bad leads, and bring you the results we both want.

Let me know when you have a moment to send that over. Let’s make this a highly productive week!

clientMessages.author: davi_dinicio
clientMessages.content: ⚡️ URGENT: Lead Feedback Needed for Priority Updates

clientMessages.author: bedeckkings
clientMessages.content: David, I was in the field yesterday all day. I will update everything now on the site. Also the calendar is working fine.
